title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 1
syllabus:
Physics - Units & Measurements, Vector Algebra, Electrostatics
Chemistry - Some Basic Concept of Chemistry, Atomic Structure, IUPAC Nomenclature, Practical Organic Chemistry
Mathematics - Logarithms, Trigonometric Ratios and Identities, Matrices & Determinants

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 2
syllabus:
Physics - Motion in a Straight Line, Motion in a Plane, Current Electricity
Chemistry - Periodic Table and Properties, Thermodynamics and Thermochemistry
Mathematics - Quadratic Equation and Inequalities, Functions, Inverse Trigonometric Functions

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 3
syllabus:
Physics - Laws of Motion and Friction, Capacitors
Chemistry - General Organic Chemistry (GOC)
Mathematics - Limit, Continuity, Differentitiability, DIfferentiation

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 4
syllabus:
Physics - Work, Power and Energy, Magnetic Effect of Current, Magnetism and Matter
Chemistry - Chemical Bonding, Chemical Kinetics
Mathematics - Straight Lines, Indefinite Integration

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 5
syllabus:
Physics - Center of Mass and Collisions, Electromagnetic Induction
Chemistry - Isomerism, Chemical Equilibrum, Redox and Equivalent Concept
Mathematics - Circle, Definite Integration

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 6
syllabus:
Physics - Rotational Motion, Alternating Current (AC), Electromagnetic Waves
Chemistry - Ionic Equilibrum, Hydrocarbon
Mathematics - Sequence and Series, Application of Derivatives

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 7
syllabus:
Physics - Elasticity, Fluid Mechanics, Geometrical Optics
Chemistry - Coordination Compounds, p-Block Elements
Mathematics - Permutation and Combination, Binomial Theorem, Vectors

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 8
syllabus:
Physics - Thermal Properties of Matter, Kinetic Theory of Gases, Wave Optics, Electromagnetic Waves
Chemistry - Liquid Solutions, Haloalkanes and Haloarenes
Mathematics - Complex Number, Three Dimentional Geometry

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 9
syllabus:
Physics - Thermodynamics, Gravitation, Dual Nature of Radiation, Atoms
Chemistry - Electrochemistry, Alcohols, Phenols and Ethers, Aldehydes and Ketones, d and f Blocks Elements
Mathematics - Probability, Parabola, Area Under the Curve

title: Quantrex Academy Part Test (EPT) - 10
syllabus:
Physics - Simple Harmonic Motion, Waves, Nuclei, Semiconductors
Chemistry - Salt Analysis, Carboxylic Acids and Their Darivatives, Compounds Containing Nitrogen, Biomolecules
Mathematics - Statistics, Ellipse, Hyperbola, Differential Equation
